name: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups flour, sugar, salt and yeast.
2. Heat water and 2 tbsp butter until hot (120-130 degrees).
3. Add water mixture and egg to flour mixture and blend at low speed just until mixed.
4. Continue mixing at high speed for 3 minutes.
5. Stir in as much remaining flour as you can until dough pulls cleanly away from sides of bowl.
6. On floured surface, knead about 2 minutes.
7. Roll dough into a 15x7 inches rectangle.
8. Melt chocolate chips and 2 tbsp butter together; cool and spread over rectangle.
9. Sprinkle with pecans.
10. Starting with the long side, roll dough up jelly-roll fashion.
11. Cut into 12 slices.
12. In a greased 13x9 inches pan, sprinkle topping ingredients (see below) evenly.
13. Place dough slices on top.
14. Cover loosely with plastic wrap or a towel.
15. Let rise in warm place until nearly double (35 to 40 minutes).
16. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes; turn out onto a serving platter.
17. If desired, drizzle Chocolate Glaze over the top of rolls.
Topping:
1/2 cup brown sugar
1/4 cup pecans, chopped
1/2 cup butter, softened
2 tbsp corn syrup
Chocolate Glaze:
1/3 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips
1 tbsp butter
